name: daemon
description: Manage persistent background processes that survive across Claude Code sessions. Start, stop, and query daemon lifecycle. Providers handle PID management, IPC address allocation, and cross-platform process spawning.

behavior.input: A daemon name, command to run, optional args/cwd/env
behavior.output: IPC address for connecting to the daemon, PID, and lifecycle status
behavior.deterministic: Start is idempotent — returns existing address if daemon is already running
